description: Extract structured fields from loan application forms

applicantName.description: Full legal name of the primary loan applicant as printed on the form, typically found in the 'Applicant Details' or 'Personal Information' section.

dateOfBirth.description: Applicant's date of birth in DD/MM/YYYY or MM-DD-YYYY format, found under 'DOB' or 'Date of Birth' field.

panNumber.description: 10-character alphanumeric PAN card number (e.g., ABCDE1234F) found under 'PAN' or 'PAN Number' field in the KYC section.

loanAmount.description: Total loan amount requested by the applicant in numeric form, found under 'Loan Amount', 'Amount Required', or 'Sanctioned Amount'. Exclude currency symbols.

loanPurpose.description: Stated reason for the loan such as 'Home Purchase', 'Education', 'Vehicle', or 'Business Expansion', found under 'Purpose of Loan'.

loanTenureMonths.description: Requested repayment period in months. If stated in years, convert to months (e.g., 5 years = 60 months).

annualIncome.description: Gross annual income of the applicant in numeric form. Found under 'Annual Income', 'Yearly Income', or 'Gross CTC'. Exclude currency symbols.

employmentType.description: Nature of employment as indicated on the form. Classify based on keywords: 'salaried/employed' → Salaried, 'professional/freelance' → Self-employed, 'proprietor/company' → Business.

employerName.description: Name of the current employer or business entity, found under 'Employer Name', 'Company Name', or 'Organization'.

mobileNumber.description: 10-digit primary mobile number of the applicant, found under 'Mobile', 'Contact No.', or 'Phone Number'.

email.description: Applicant's email address found under 'Email ID' or 'Email Address'.

residentialAddress.description: Complete residential address including house number, street, city, state, and PIN code, found under 'Current Address' or 'Residential Address'.
